name: Kratzet- Mehlkratzet - Duranand
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix a pancake batter using the ingredients.
2. In a lightly greased skillet, cook at medium heat on both sides.
3. During cooking, cut the pancakes in half with the skillet and transfer to another hot skillet.
4. Continue sautéing the pieces in a little butter until cooked through.
5. Just before serving, dust with sugar.
6. Serve with stewed fruit or as a side dish for meat dishes with gravy.
Serves 4.
